api: HighLevel (Go HighLevel / LeadConnector) REST API v2 (https://highlevel.stoplight.io/)
scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (contacts, opportunities, pipelines, custom_fields, form_submissions), routed through the upstream source-high-level proxy's /upstream/<resource> paths exactly as legacy calls them. HighLevel's write endpoints (contact/opportunity create-update-delete, workflow triggers, etc.) are out of scope for this migration (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented contact creation; not implemented in this bundle
legacy connector never implemented contact updates; not implemented in this bundle
legacy connector never implemented opportunity creation; not implemented in this bundle
calendars/appointments not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
workflows not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
